'''Arajen Turmen''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|gunboat]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was stationed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and later became the leader of the settlement created from the former [[Eidolon Base]] facility after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="SOT" />

{{Char-stub}}
